The Frayman Group, Inc.

3101 Park Blvd

Palo Alto, California 94306

For Wire Transfers:
Account Name: THE FRAYMAN GROUP INC Beneficiary Account Number: 827220333 Beneficiary Bank Name: JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A. – NEW YORK Beneficiary Bank Swift BIC: CHASUS33 Beneficiary Bank Rounting Number: 021000021
For ACH Credit:
Account Name: THE FRAYMAN GROUP INC Account Number: 827220333 Bank Routing Number: 322271627
Currency Account No. USD 827220333
Payments in currencies other than USD must be submitted via wire transfer. Payments in USD can be processed via wire or ACH.
If you have any questions regarding this change or require additional information, please do not hesitate to contact us at ar@intapp.com.
